title: DarkSpawn
description: Teleport to spawn or lobby fixed location by using a simple command
body:
Get a server today and play with your friends! Click HERE or below banner & Use Code GAMERPOTION to get 25 off!


 

DarkSpawn


Teleport to a fixed spawn location (spawn/lobby teleport) |  View Changelog

Server side is supported. You can install this on the server and not need to have it installed on the client.

Created by the same authors who made DarkRPG (for a full RPG experience, get the DarkRPG modpack and enjoy quests and rpg gameplay)

 

Features

(Your vanilla experience will be further enhanced thanks to these features) 

Teleport to a fixed Spawn location using the command /trigger darkspawn and it will teleport you to the default coordinates 10 100 10. This is useful if you want to teleport to a centralized area or if you want your server users to be able to teleport to a spawn or lobby location. 

The coordinates are fully customizable via datapacks! Simply get the datapack from the GamerPotion Discord channel's #files section and place it inside your world's 'datapacks' folder. Server owners can do the same but make sure you have finalized, saved & uploaded the file before you let your players into the game.  You can then edit the files inside the datapack to change the coordinates and dimensions (3rd line).

Want to random teleport? Try the DarkRTP mod

 

Permission - Feel free to use in your modpacks.

 

Click the banner below to get your server today! or go to BisectHosting.com  and make sure to use the code 'gamerpotion' to get your 25% off.
